• Interactive audio visualizer with WebGL and Canvas rendering
  • Supports local audio files, microphone input, and WebSocket streams
  • Customizable visual effects with real-time parameter controls
  • Persistent settings storage using localStorage
  • Responsive design with multiple visualizer presets
    const visualizers = { bars: { settings: [ { id: 'barCount', type: 'range', min: 16, max: 256 } ] } };
    const masterSettings = [ { id: 'sensitivity', type: 'range', min: 0.1, max: 5 }, { id: 'playToggle', type: 'button' } ];

This audio visualizer application provides a rich, interactive experience with multiple input sources and customizable visual effects. The modular design allows for easy extension with new visualizer types and supports persistent user preferences through localStorage integration.
